metadata.phase: Phase 36: Offline UI Accessibility Completion & Educational Reproducibility

existing_feature_audit.accessibility: Phase 35 A1 = static WCAG AA (focus-visible + measured contrast). aria-live present on ONLY the integrity banner; dynamic state changes (tab/search/slider/verify) not announced (SC 4.1.3 gap).
existing_feature_audit.glossary: glossary object exists but is sign-off-pack-scoped; no consolidated cross-tab glossary/data-dictionary.
existing_feature_audit.export: per-section CSV + chart PNG exports exist via downloadText/downloadBlob; no single byte-identical reproducibility evidence-pack export.

gaps.title: Live-region status announcements (WCAG 2.1 AA SC 4.1.3 completion)
gaps.contract_change: none required; optional ADDITIVE 1.20.0->1.21.0 adding a11y_audit.live_regions only
criteria: one polite sr-only live region; tab activation, search-result count, slider/percentile read-out, integrity verify result each push a concise update
announcements describe existing on-screen state only; no model figure computed in announcement path; governed read-outs bit-identical
no focus stealing; no aria-live=assertive; region never visible
if a11y_audit.live_regions added: build-time, display-read-only, ADDITIVE; every pre-existing key bit-identical
new self-test checks cover live-region presence + four wiring points; suite ok:true 0/0
ui_app_self_test ok:true, 0 network, 0 JS errors; zero-install + file:// safe preserved
NO model parameter changes; stop-rule honoured; MR-016/MR-017 not pre-empted; all eight self-tests ok:true

gaps.title: Consolidated glossary & methodology explainer surface
gaps.contract_change: ADDITIVE minor bump adding explainer/glossary_global key only
criteria: every governed headline term and each tab primary read-out has a glossary entry with definition + method basis + limitation provenance, built at build time
limitation text carried bit-for-bit from owner_decision_p31 / archived design notes; nothing re-derived or re-labelled
display-only; recomputes no model quantity; governed figures bit-identical
ADDITIVE-only contract change; every pre-existing ui_data key renders bit-identically
new self-test checks cover global glossary presence, per-tab coverage, provenance carry-through; suite ok:true 0/0
ui_app_self_test ok:true 0 network 0 JS errors; zero-install + file:// safe; NO model parameter changes

gaps.title: Single reproducibility evidence-pack export
criteria: exported payload bytes equal embedded ui_data bytes; exported section_digests/root_digest recompute and match
export path makes NO network call, uses NO storage API; works under file://
a hash is not a model figure; governed read-outs bit-identical; export recomputes nothing model-related
new self-test checks cover export control presence + byte/digest equality via jsdom fallback test; suite ok:true 0/0
ui_app_self_test ok:true 0 network 0 JS errors; zero-install preserved; NO model parameter changes; stop-rule honoured

execution_plan.task1: THIS cycle - research + design note; no code/data change
execution_plan.task2: implement E1 (live-region announcements) + self-test checks + re-audit
execution_plan.task3: implement E2 (consolidated glossary/explainer) + additive contract bump + self-test checks
execution_plan.task4: implement E3 (reproducibility evidence-pack export) + fallback test
execution_plan.task5: phase summary + consolidated baseline re-audit -> PHASE 36 COMPLETE
